rationale: The LLM capabilities demonstrated (intermediate web exploitation, systematic methodology) have limited direct transfer to the extortion/negotiation step, which is primarily a social engineering and communication task. LLMs can meaningfully assist with drafting persuasive ransom communications, researching victim financial capacity, and scripting negotiations — providing modest uplift of approximately 3-7 percentage points above the 30% baseline. However, the fundamental determinants of ransom payment (victim recovery capability, cyber insurance coverage, legal advice, backup quality) are structural factors that LLM-assisted communication quality cannot overcome, keeping the estimated probability in the 31-40% range.
